news.title: Barricaded suspect prompts road closure in Jonesboro
news.summary: Police closed multiple streets in Jonesboro on Sunday as officers responded to an active law enforcement incident involving a barricaded suspect.

news.title: Police seek murder suspect in fatal shooting
news.summary: Henry County police are searching for a man wanted in connection with the fatal shooting of a 37-year-old man whose body was found in a wooded area last month.

news.title: 2 arrested in Fayette County after drug seizure and fraud discovery, sheriff’s office says
news.summary: A routine traffic stop in Fayette County recently led to the discovery of an extensive fraud operation and the recovery of illegal narcotics, Fayette County Sheriff’s Office said. Two people were arre

news.title: Argument leads to gunfire leaving 18-year-old injured in Atlanta
news.summary: An 18-year-old man is recovering at an area hospital after being shot just after midnight Sunday in Atlanta.

news.title: Road closed as metro Atlanta police investigate barricaded suspect
news.summary: A road block is in place in part of Clayton County as police investigate an incident involving a barricaded suspect.

news.title: Suspect arrested for malice murder in DeKalb County shooting, sheriff says
news.summary: Isaiah Turner, 20, is in custody, charged with malice murder in the March shooting death of Jamar Schaffers, according to the DeKalb County Sheriff's Office.

news.title: James Anthony Zachery: Fugitive wanted for child rape apprehended
news.summary: Fulton County deputies arrested a Top 10 Most Wanted sex trafficking suspect Friday afternoon in Decatur on charges of raping a 10-year-old child.

news.title: Fulton County arrest 'Most Wanted' suspect on sex crime charges against 10-year-old child
news.summary: Deputies said James Anthony Zachery was arrested in Decatur on July 17, on multiple charges, including trafficking a person for sexual servitude.
